_label_note: EU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public support-hotline bait, obfuscated VAT/tax/passport phone-shaped fragments, dotted-date and filing-reference phone bait, role/placeholder emails, template passport values, EU registry/ISIN/LEI/tax numeric fragments, log-id amount fragments, placeholder country-code phones, and negated MAE/contingent-MNPI language. Full EU member-state national-ID breadth and broader semantic GDPR special-category coverage remain ideal-tier gaps.

must_detect.matched_text:
Inside information — non-public under EU MAR; disclosure delayed per Article 17 until 12 Sep 2026 14:00 CET; do not distribute.
From: Legal & Compliance, Aurora Ridge Industries SE (listed on Mercora Exchange); To: Board of Directors; Subject: Project Veldspar acquisition of Nerium Grid SA.
We intend to sign a definitive Share Purchase Agreement on 11 Jun 2026 to acquire 72% of Nerium Grid SA for €184.5m cash, implying a 28.4% premium to the last unaffected close; the remaining 28% will be addressed via a mandatory offer.
Conditions precedent include Verdalian Securities Supervisory Authority (VSSA) clearance, antitrust approval, and no Material Adverse Change; counsel advises no MAE/MAC has occurred and the draft MAC carve-outs cover general economic conditions.
Financial impact (non-public): internal research note projects €14m run-rate synergies and ~5.1% EPS accretion in FY27, assuming an 8.5% WACC and integration costs of €9.7m over 18 months.
Market sounding/wall-crossing has not commenced; insider lists must be updated today; clean-team protocol and advisers’ instructions are attached.
Cross-border transfer: confirmatory diligence requires limited export of HR datasets to BrightLatitude Inc. (US processor) under SCCs with TIA completed; avoid uploading GDPR Art 9 special-category data to the VDR.
CSRD/SFDR: double materiality and PAI indicators to be refreshed for consolidation on closing; Taxonomy Article 8 KPIs and ESRS E1/E2 baselines will be revised for the next investor-relations draft.
Public source note: our 2024 sustainability bulletin on auroraridge.eu (public) states 52% renewable electricity; that figure is stale and excludes Nerium’s sites.
MAR workflow: ad hoc announcement and investor Q&A are drafted; VSSA pre-notification template is ready; target release window is post-embargo or upon signing if leak risk escalates.
Note that the draft includes a bring-down of reps at closing and a no-leak undertaking; this is not expected to trigger a MAC.
next steps: finalize confirmatory dd, scrub data room for art 9 indicators, align with tax on step-plan, update deal checklist v3, and yes the spa day voucher email can wait.
Contact: Ms. Livia Koenig, General Counsel, l.koenig@auroraridge.eu, +329 555 0142; for IR wording, Mr. Paolo Deren, paolo.deren@auroraridge.eu.
